statement: What organizers of events should be able to make a request for upon entry is a vaccination certificate.
What the Netherlands should make its exit from is the European Union (EU).
What it should be given permission to set off again during the upcoming New Year's Eve are decorative fireworks.
What there should be is an additional tax on making a purchase of meat.
What the government should effect the abolition of is the ban on face-covering clothing.
What the national government, rather than provinces and municipalities, should make a decision is where new residential areas are built.
What the government should make reductions in to 5 percent is the VAT on cultural activities.
What the Netherlands should effect the construction of is a new nuclear power plant.
What the Dutch government should make an apology for is the historical slave trade.
What primary school teachers should have is earnings as much as secondary school teachers.
What the Netherlands should effect the introduction of for short-distance flights is an additional flight tax.
What asylum seekers with a temporary residence permit should effect the completion of before getting a rental home is integration.
What should be given legal authorization are both the purchase and sale of soft drugs by coffee shops.
What an increase in minimum wages should no longer automatically give rise to is an increase in welfare benefits.
What new residential areas should have a proportion of is at least 40 percent green space.
What the Netherlands should effect the acceptance of are more refugees than it currently does.
What limiting rights and freedoms is necessary to take up the fight against is organized crime.
What it should be easier for companies to effect the dismissal of are workers.
What the state should take are measures to effect the redistribution of wealth from the rich to the poor.
What the government must effect an increase in, even if this means increasing taxes, is spending on public health care.
What should be given a reduction without reducing workers' wages is the working day.
What governments should make as few interventions in as possible is the economy.
What taxes on fossil fuels must be raised to effect the financing of is the Green Transition.
What the future Spanish government should effect an increase in by means of large water transfers is irrigated agricultural areas.
What we must effect the recovery of to better defend Spain's interests in Europe is more sovereignty.
What the Spanish government should give a boost to is the strengthening of NATO in Europe.
What the best way to solve the conflict in Catalonia is is for its citizens to be able to cast a vote on their future in a referendum.
What negotiating with pro-independence supporters effects a weakening of is the State.
What must be given recognition by the Constitution is the right to self-determination.
What the policies of linguistic immersion in the native language of bilingual Autonomous Communities have a detrimental effect on is Spanish.
What is necessary to effect the repeal of is the Law of Democratic Memory passed during this legislature.
What immigrants should make payments for are their own health services.
Where a general speed limit is to take effect is across all highways.
What Germany is to effect an increase in is its defense spending.
What young people over the age of 16 are to be granted permission to vote in are Bundestag elections.
What is to be given stricter restrictions by law is the ability of landlords to increase housing rents.
What all employed persons are to be given requirement for being insured in is the statutory pension scheme.
What is to be given a stronger boost than other living arrangements is the traditional family of father, mother and children.
What should continue to be given permission are donations from companies to political parties.
What is to be given permission to go into operation as planned is the Nord Stream 2 Baltic Sea pipeline, which transports gas from Russia to Germany.
What female civil servants are to be given permission to wear while on duty are headscarves.
What the federal government is to make provision for is more financial support for projects to combat anti-Semitism.
What Chinese companies should not be given permission to receive are contracts for the expansion of the communications infrastructure in Germany.
What the state should continue to effect the collection of for religious communities is church tax.
What is to be generally permitted is the controlled sale of cannabis given general approval.
What Germany is to make its exit from is the European Union.
What facial recognition software should be given permission to be used for is video surveillance in public places.
What should be given a stronger boost than conventional agriculture is organic agriculture.
What are to be given recognition by the state as religious communities are Islamic associations.
What is to be given an increase to at least 12 euros by 2022 at the latest is the statutory minimum wage.
What is to be given heavier taxation is air traffic.
What companies are to make decision for themselves is whether to allow their employees to work from home.
What social transfers should be given an increase to reduce are the effects of inflation on citizens.
What the state should give funding for if the waiting time at a public facility exceeds three months are private visits to specialists.
What the state should make provision for for every child is a free nursery place.
What schools should have more freedom to make a choice of is the content covered in the curriculum.
What the state should effect the construction of for rent is low-rent apartments.
Who taxes should be given an increase for are top earners.
What all entrepreneurs should make payment of regardless of income is the same health premium.
What Poland should effect the adoption of is the migrant relocation solutions adopted by the European Union.
What should be given a further increase is the share of defense spending in Poland's GDP.
What should be given an increase at the expense of the central government is the powers of local governments.
What should be given restrictions is public media funding from the state budget.
What should be given restrictions are the powers of the secret services to track the activities of citizens on the Internet.
What the EU's rule of law mechanism makes threats against is Hungary's sovereignty.
What Hungarian foreign policy should be given guidance solely by is Hungarian economic interests.
What Hungary should make a decision by referendum is whether to remain part of the EU.
What the age of compulsory schooling should be given an increase back to is 18.
What education spending should be given an increase to is at least the OECD average of 5.2 per cent (GDP).
What should be given a twofold increase are teachers' salaries.
What has been given a reduction by changing the university model (reorganisation into a trust) is political influence.
Who should be given permission to marry are only men and women.
What the state should take to give a boost to equal participation of fathers and mothers in child-rearing are targeted measures.
What the Hungarian government should give ratification to is the Istanbul Convention, which combats violence against women and domestic violence.
What one effective way to make reductions in rents is is to conclude favourable gas supply contracts with Russia.
What a price freeze on some basic foodstuffs (e.g. chicken tail, milk) is the right step to take up the fight against is inflation.
What should be given an extension is the current three-month unemployment benefit.
What is a better way to give support to families than increasing the family allowance is a family tax credit.
What it is right that the Education Office, rather than parents and kindergarten teachers, makes a decision on is the school entry maturity of children over the age of six.
Where the use of medical cannabis should be given legal authorization is in Hungary.
What should be given heavier taxation are polluting companies.
What should be given restrictions in larger cities through various measures (P+R parking, construction of cycle paths, improvement of public transport) is car traffic.
What the redevelopment of urban green spaces (e.g. the Liget project in Budapest) has a need for is a broad social dialogue.
What has gone too far is European economic integration: what member states should effect the regaining of is more autonomy.
What citizens should be given a guarantee of is freedom of choice in end-of-life matters (euthanasia).
What should be given permission is recreational use of marijuana/cannabis.
What a law is needed to effect the prevention of relocating their production abroad are companies.
What businesses should be able to effect the dismissal of more easily are employees.
What the introduction of a single income tax rate ("flat tax") would have benefits for is the Italian economy.
What should be given time limits is beach concessions to private individuals.
What should be given a boost is the use of nuclear power plants for the purpose of producing energy.
What Italy should effect the construction of are more incinerators/thermal power plants.
What drilling is necessary to make discoveries of are more energy resources.
What Italy should effect the cessation of sending to the Ukrainian government are arms and war material.
What the federal government should make an allocation of for health insurance premium subsidies is more funding.
What are to be given a reduction as part of the reform of the BVG (occupational pension plan) are pensions (lowering the minimum conversion rate from 6.8% to 6%).
What paid parental leave should be given an increase beyond are today's 14 weeks of maternity leave and two weeks of paternity leave.
What the federal government should make provision for public housing construction is more financial support.
What insured persons should make a greater contribution to is health care costs (e.g., increase the minimum deductible).
What should be given stricter restrictions is the Federal Council's ability to restrict private and economic life in the event of a pandemic.
What the federal government should be given the authority to make a determination on is the hospital offering (national hospital planning with regard to locations and range of services).
What the federal government should effect the raising of are the requirements for the high school.
What should be given permission to work in Switzerland are more qualified workers from non-EU/EFTA countries (increase third-country quota).
What should be given legal authorization is cannabis use.
What doctors should be given permission to administer is direct active euthanasia.
What be given separate taxation are married couples (individual taxation).
What should be given a further reduction through fiscal equalization are the differences between cantons with high and low financial capacity.
What private households should be free to make a choice of is their electricity supplier (complete liberalization of the electricity market).
What Switzerland should have a ban on starting in 2035 is the registration of new passenger cars with internal combustion engines.
What it's fair that environmental and landscape protection rules are being relaxed to give permission for is the development of renewable energy.
What should be given permission again is the construction of new nuclear power plants.
What the state should give a guarantee of is a comprehensive public service offering also in rural regions.
What should be is a popular initiative aims to make reductions in television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses).
What the voting age should be given a reduction to is 16.
What the army's target number of soldiers should have an expansion to is at least 120,000.
What the Swiss Armed Forces should have an expansion of is their cooperation with NATO.

What the Federal Council should be allowed to give authorization to to re-export Swiss weapons in cases of a war of aggression in violation of international law (e.g., the attack on Ukraine) are other states.

What Switzerland should effect the termination of the Schengen agreement with the EU and what Switzerland should effect the reintroduction of more security checks directly at the border are more security checks.
What companies should be obliged to give assurances that their subsidiaries and suppliers operating abroad comply with are social and environmental standards.
What Switzerland should effect the termination of are the Bilateral Agreements with the EU and what Switzerland should seek is a free trade agreement without the free movement of persons.
What Switzerland should make a return to is a strict interpretation of neutrality (renounce economic sanctions to a large extent).
